themes: The backlog is overwhelmingly Manager-level, suggesting a strong need to connect SOCi's day-to-day workflow and reporting features more directly to the people who operate locations hands-on.

Wait times span 11 to 363 days with dozens of contacts past the 100-day mark, indicating a systemic follow-through gap that risks eroding trust with some of SOCi's most important multi-location brands.

Several accounts—Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Anytime Fitness, Ford, and others—appear multiple times, signaling that product feedback or unresolved needs may be spreading within those organizations and warrant consolidated, account-level outreach strategies.
